title: Door Lock Fault
shortDescription: The door interlock is not engaging or the door microswitch is not providing a closed signal.
fullDescription: Error E01 on Grundig washing machines indicates the door lock (interlock) has not engaged within the expected time. Grundig washers use the Beko/Arcelik error code platform. The machine cannot start without confirming the door is locked.

causes.cause: Door not fully closed or catch misaligned
Control board door lock output failed

symptoms: Door lock clicks but does not hold

fixSteps.title: Check door closure
fixSteps.instruction: Push the door firmly. Check nothing prevents full closure — clothing, seal, or damaged catch.

fixSteps.title: Inspect door catch
fixSteps.instruction: Examine the catch and striker plate for wear or damage.

fixSteps.title: Test the interlock
fixSteps.instruction: Access from inside the door rim. Test continuity across terminals.

fixSteps.title: Replace the interlock
fixSteps.instruction: Peel back door seal, remove retaining band, swap interlock.

whenToCallPro: If interlock and catch are fine, the control board may be faulty.
videoSearchQuery: Grundig washer E01 door lock interlock fix

faq.q: Are Grundig and Beko error codes the same?
faq.a: Grundig shares the Beko/Arcelik platform. Many error codes are identical.

faq.q: How do I open a stuck door?
faq.a: Wait 2-3 minutes after turning off. Use the emergency release tab if available.

faq.q: Can I bypass the door lock?
faq.a: Never. It prevents the door opening during high-speed spin.

title: Water Fill Timeout
shortDescription: The washer has not filled with water within the allowed time.
fullDescription: Error E02 indicates the machine did not reach the required water level within the timeout. This is typically a water supply issue. Check taps, hoses, and filters before suspecting a machine fault.

fixSteps.title: Check water supply
fixSteps.instruction: Ensure tap is fully open.

fixSteps.title: Inspect hose and filters
fixSteps.instruction: Check for kinks. Clean mesh filter screens.

fixSteps.title: Test inlet valve
fixSteps.instruction: Check for 230V at valve during fill. If voltage present but no water, valve is faulty.

fixSteps.title: Replace inlet valve
fixSteps.instruction: Turn off water, disconnect hose, swap valve.

videoSearchQuery: Grundig washer E02 water fill error fix

faq.a: Yes, minimum 1 bar is needed.

faq.q: How often should I clean filters?
faq.a: Every 6 months.

faq.q: Do I need hot and cold connections?
faq.a: Most modern Grundig washers use cold only.

title: Drain Pump Timeout
shortDescription: The washer could not drain water within the allowed time.
fullDescription: Error E03 indicates the drain cycle did not complete in time. The drain filter may be blocked, the hose obstructed, or the pump has failed.

fixSteps.title: Clean drain filter
fixSteps.instruction: Open access panel, place towels below, unscrew filter cap, remove debris.

fixSteps.title: Check drain hose
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect for kinks and blockages.

fixSteps.title: Inspect pump impeller
fixSteps.instruction: With filter removed, check impeller spins freely.

fixSteps.title: Replace drain pump
fixSteps.instruction: If motor dead, replace.

videoSearchQuery: Grundig washer E03 drain pump blocked fix

faq.a: Use the filter access at the bottom-front.
Every 1-2 months.
Yes, a blocked wall drain prevents emptying.

title: Overfill / Water Level Too High
shortDescription: The water level has exceeded the maximum safe level.
fullDescription: Error E04 indicates the water level sensor detected excessive water. The inlet valve may be stuck open, the pressure switch faulty, or siphoning is occurring through the drain hose.

fixSteps.title: Turn off water
fixSteps.instruction: Close water supply tap immediately. Unplug machine.

fixSteps.title: Check drain hose routing
fixSteps.instruction: Ensure high loop above drum level before standpipe.

fixSteps.title: Test inlet valve
fixSteps.instruction: With machine unplugged, check if water still flows in. If yes, valve stuck.

fixSteps.title: Replace valve or switch
fixSteps.instruction: Replace whichever is faulty.

whenToCallPro: If valve and hose are fine, board may need diagnosis.
videoSearchQuery: Grundig washer E04 overfill error fix

faq.a: Yes, turn off the water supply immediately.
Water flowing back into the machine through a drain hose without a high loop.

faq.q: Should I turn off the tap when not in use?
faq.a: Good practice to prevent flooding from valve failures.

title: NTC Temperature Sensor Fault
shortDescription: The water temperature sensor is providing an out-of-range reading.
fullDescription: Error E05 indicates the NTC thermistor is out of range, open, or shorted. The washer cannot heat water safely without valid temperature data.

fixSteps.title: Reset
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug for 10 minutes.

fixSteps.title: Test NTC
fixSteps.instruction: Disconnect NTC from heater housing. Measure resistance (~20K ohms at 20°C).

fixSteps.title: Test heater
fixSteps.instruction: Check heater resistance (20-30 ohms) and insulation (over 2 megaohms).

fixSteps.title: Replace NTC
fixSteps.instruction: Pull old sensor out, push new one in.

whenToCallPro: Only if NTC and heater test fine.
videoSearchQuery: Grundig washer E05 NTC temperature sensor fix

faq.a: No, typically 5-15.
Machine may run but will not heat water.
In the heater housing at the bottom of the tub.

title: Heating Element Failure
shortDescription: The wash heating element has failed or is not being powered.
fullDescription: Error E06 indicates the heating element is open circuit (burned out), shorted to ground, or the control board heater relay has failed. Water will not heat during wash cycles.

fixSteps.title: Test heater
fixSteps.instruction: Measure resistance (20-30 ohms) and insulation (over 2 megaohms).

fixSteps.title: Check connections
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect terminal connections for corrosion.

fixSteps.title: Check for voltage
fixSteps.instruction: During heat phase, check for mains voltage at heater terminals.

fixSteps.title: Replace heater
fixSteps.instruction: Remove old element, install new one with fresh seal.

whenToCallPro: If heater trips the RCD or board relay suspected.
videoSearchQuery: Grundig washer E06 heating element replacement

faq.a: Possible but poor cleaning.
Heater leaking to ground trips the safety switch.
Typically 7-12 years.

title: Motor Fault / Tacho Error
shortDescription: The motor speed sensor is not providing valid feedback.
fullDescription: Error E07 indicates the motor tachometer or speed sensor is not sending expected data to the control board. Worn carbon brushes are the most common cause on models with brushed motors.

fixSteps.title: Check carbon brushes
fixSteps.instruction: Remove rear panel, extract brushes. Replace if shorter than 1 cm.

fixSteps.title: Test tachometer
fixSteps.instruction: Measure coil resistance (100-200 ohms). Check magnet is secure.

fixSteps.title: Test motor windings
fixSteps.instruction: Measure resistance (2-8 ohms). Check for ground faults.

fixSteps.title: Replace worn parts
fixSteps.instruction: Replace brushes, tacho, or motor as needed.

whenToCallPro: If brushes and tacho are fine.
videoSearchQuery: Grundig washer E07 motor carbon brushes fix

faq.a: 5-8 years typically.
Yes, it is a common DIY repair.

faq.q: Do newer Grundig washers have brushless motors?
faq.a: Some newer models use inverter motors without brushes.

title: Motor Triac Fault
shortDescription: The motor triac on the control board has failed.
fullDescription: Error E08 indicates the triac that controls power to the motor has short-circuited or failed. The motor may run uncontrolled or not at all. This requires control board replacement.

fixSteps.title: Power reset
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug for 10 minutes.

fixSteps.title: Test motor
fixSteps.instruction: Check motor windings for shorts and ground faults.

fixSteps.title: Inspect wiring
fixSteps.instruction: Check motor wiring for damage.

fixSteps.title: Replace board
fixSteps.instruction: If motor fine, replace board. Also replace motor if faulty.

whenToCallPro: E08 requires board replacement. Professional recommended.
videoSearchQuery: Grundig washer E08 motor triac board fix

faq.q: Can the triac be replaced alone?
faq.a: With electronics soldering, but board replacement is standard.
If motor runs uncontrolled, unplug immediately.
Yes, protects against voltage spikes.

title: EEPROM / Software Error
shortDescription: The EEPROM memory on the control board has corrupted data.
fullDescription: Error E09 indicates the EEPROM chip has a data corruption or the control board has a general software fault. The machine cannot execute programs correctly.

fixSteps.title: Full power reset
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug for 30 minutes.

fixSteps.title: Reseat connectors
fixSteps.instruction: Check and reseat all board connectors.

fixSteps.title: EEPROM reprogramming
fixSteps.instruction: Technician may reprogram with correct firmware.

fixSteps.title: Replace board
fixSteps.instruction: If reprogramming fails, replace with pre-programmed board.

whenToCallPro: E09 almost always requires professional intervention.
videoSearchQuery: Grundig washer E09 EEPROM control board fix

faq.a: Power outages during write operations and voltage spikes.

faq.q: Can a power cut cause E09?
faq.a: Yes, especially during a cycle.
Genuine replacements come with correct firmware.

title: Pressure Switch / Water Level Error
shortDescription: The pressure switch is providing conflicting or invalid signals.
fullDescription: Error E10 indicates the pressure switch is reading outside expected parameters. The control board cannot determine the correct water level, preventing proper fill and drain operations.
symptoms: Machine does not fill or drain correctly

fixSteps.title: Check pressure hose
fixSteps.instruction: Find the hose from tub to pressure switch. Ensure connected and not blocked.

fixSteps.title: Clean pressure chamber
fixSteps.instruction: Clean buildup where the hose connects to the tub.

fixSteps.title: Test switch
fixSteps.instruction: Blow into the hose port and listen for clicks.

fixSteps.title: Replace switch
fixSteps.instruction: If faulty, disconnect connector and hose, install new switch.

whenToCallPro: If switch and hose test fine.
videoSearchQuery: Grundig washer E10 pressure switch error fix

faq.a: Measures water level by sensing air pressure in a tube connected to the tub.
Yes, powder detergent can block the pressure hose or chamber.

faq.q: How often should I clean the pressure chamber?
faq.a: Annually.

title: Unbalanced Load / Vibration Error
shortDescription: Excessive vibration or load imbalance detected during spin.
fullDescription: Error E11 indicates the control board detected excessive vibration during the spin cycle. The machine attempts to redistribute the load but aborts spin if imbalance persists.

fixSteps.title: Redistribute load
fixSteps.instruction: Open door and spread laundry evenly. Add small items to balance single large items.

fixSteps.title: Check machine level
fixSteps.instruction: Ensure all four feet on floor and machine is level.

fixSteps.title: Inspect shock absorbers
fixSteps.instruction: Press drum down and release. Excessive bouncing means worn absorbers.

fixSteps.title: Replace shock absorbers
fixSteps.instruction: Replace if worn.

whenToCallPro: If load redistribution does not help and machine is level.
videoSearchQuery: Grundig washer E11 vibration imbalance fix

faq.a: Often just an unbalanced load. Try redistributing.
Mix large and small items. Do not overload.
Yes, worn absorbers allow excessive drum movement.

title: Display Communication Error
shortDescription: Communication between the display and main control board has failed.
fullDescription: Error E12 indicates a communication fault between the display board and the main control board. Usually caused by a loose cable, failed board, or moisture damage.

fixSteps.title: Reseat connections
fixSteps.instruction: Open top panel, firmly reseat cable between boards.

fixSteps.title: Check for moisture
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect boards for corrosion. Clean with electronics cleaner.

fixSteps.title: Power cycle
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug for 10 minutes after reseating.

fixSteps.title: Replace display board
fixSteps.instruction: If reseating fails, replace display board first.

whenToCallPro: If unsure which board is faulty.
videoSearchQuery: Grundig washer E12 display communication error fix

faq.a: Yes, moisture corrodes connectors.
Start with the cable, then display board.
Moderately common, especially in humid environments.
